patterns.name: Authentication
patterns.description: JWT-based email/password auth with rate limiting and bcrypt

patterns.name: CRUD Operations
patterns.description: Generic CRUD endpoints with pagination, filtering, sorting, and validation

patterns.name: HTTP Middleware
patterns.description: Recovery, CORS, request ID, logging, timeout, body limit, proxy, tracing, debug

patterns.name: Role-Based Access Control
patterns.description: Hierarchical RBAC with wildcard permissions and HTTP middleware

patterns.name: Rate Limiting
patterns.description: Fixed window, sliding window, and token bucket rate limiters with middleware

patterns.name: Request Validation
patterns.description: Chainable validation builder with JSON, query, and form support

patterns.name: File Upload
patterns.description: Secure file upload with magic bytes validation, size limits, and path traversal prevention

patterns.name: Health Checks
patterns.description: Liveness and readiness probes with HTTP, TCP, and custom checks, SSRF protection

patterns.name: In-Memory Cache
patterns.description: Generic TTL + LRU cache with background cleanup and stats

patterns.name: Pagination
patterns.description: Offset/limit and cursor-based pagination with middleware

patterns.name: Email Sender
patterns.description: SMTP email with templates, attachments, async queue, TLS, and header injection protection
